metadata.name: Add a New Contact to CRM

description: An agent meets a potential client at an open house and needs to add them to their CRM for follow-up.

nodes.task_description: Gather the contact's name, phone number, and email address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects the basic contact information.

nodes.task_description: Create a new contact record in the CRM system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the new contact profile.

nodes.task_description: Add the contact to a 'New Lead' follow-up campaign or drip email sequence.

expected_outcome.value: Agent assigns the contact to the appropriate marketing campaign.
